About Tari
Chapter one
Play the
Tari Airdrop Game
Tari is the L1 protocol powered by you - proof of work, beautiful apps anyone can use, and an ingenious native app platform to put all of its power in your hands.
Connect Wallet
Earn gems, and get that sweet sweet Tari
Let's play a game anon: complete quests and earn special gems. If you are the luckiest of lucky souls, you will also earn a precious turtle shell or an astonishingly rare sky hammer along the way. Don’t let them out of your grasp! You need all three to get to the promised land of max Tari airdrop. Anon, sleep is for when you are dead. Refresh this page constantly, as new quests will appear without notice. You won’t want to miss a single one.

Your score
No one wants a silver medal, anon. Collect gems, precious turtle shells and incredibly rare sky hammers to climb the ranks and conquer the leaderboard.
🔒
Invite friends
Unlock the ability to earn more gems from inviting friends by completing the first two introductory missions.
Invite friends. Earn 1,000
Earn more gems and rewards by inviting friends. Share your unique link and earn 1000 additional gems for each friend that signs up and completes the follow on X quest.
0
Claimed invites
0
Bonus Gems
Yats are for winners!

We will let you in on a little secret. We love emojis. And we LOVE Yats. Yats are in our blood, and everyone who owns one is family. Every Yat unlocks a treasure of precious turtle shells and or ultra-rare sky hammers depending on its generation and rhythm score (Gen 0 and Gen 1 only). Oh, and one more thing: hold time matters. Don’t let them out of your grasp! Thank you, Yat community. We exist because of you.

Oh and one more thing: hold time matters. Don’t let them out of your grasp! Thank you Yat community. We exist because of you. (What’s a Yat?)

Learn how the points work
rare

Turtle Shells

How to acquire

  • Own 1 or more Yats
  • Gen Zero or One
    ?
  • Rhythm Score 79 or lower
    ?
epic

Sky Hammers

How to acquire

  • Own 1 or more Yats
  • Gen Zero or One
    ?
  • Rhythm Score 80 or higher
    ?
Collect Yats
A big thank you to the Yat community!
Built by tinkerers.
Designed for the masses.
Built for People,
not Bots
Have a laptop or desktop PC? Mine Tari to secure the network and earn rewards. Tari’s ASIC-resistant algorithm ensures real users, not bots, benefit. With 70% of tokens allocated to miners, mining is the best way to earn Tari.
Ferociously Performant
Powered by a unique Rust implementation of Cerberus consensus, Tari delivers massive parallelization and fast finality with ultra-low fees. Build applications that can scale to meet your wildest ambitions on Tari.
A Game Changer for Developers
Tari gives developers direct access to users via a revolutionary native app distribution platform called Tari Universe. Tari Universe bundles a Tari miner, wallet, and app launcher into a single stunningly beautiful interface.
